children.heading: Treatment as financial institutions
children.label: a Treatment as financial institutions
children.text: Notwithstanding section 509(3)(B) of the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act [], any futures commission merchant, commodity trading advisor, commodity pool operator, or introducing broker that is subject to the jurisdiction of the Commission under this chapter with respect to any financial activity shall be treated as a financial institution for purposes of title V of such Act [ et seq.] with respect to such financial activity.15 U.S.C. 6809(3)(B)15 U.S.C. 6801

children.heading: Treatment of CFTC as Federal functional regulator
children.label: b Treatment of CFTC as Federal functional regulator
children.text: For purposes of title V of such Act [ et seq.], the Commission shall be treated as a Federal functional regulator within the meaning of section 509(2) of such Act [] and shall prescribe regulations under such title within 6 months after .15 U.S.C. 680115 U.S.C. 6809(2)December 21, 2000
